name: claude-workspace-plugins
description: Production-tested Claude Code plugins for modern development workflows

plugins.name: DEV-BE-PYTHON
plugins.description: Python/FastAPI Clean Architecture backend development guidelines with domain entities, use cases, and repository patterns.

plugins.name: DEV-BE-GO
plugins.description: Go/Chi Clean Architecture backend development guidelines with domain entities, services, and repository patterns (sqlc + pgx). Includes DDD patterns, CQRS guidance, slog observability, and gRPC support.

plugins.name: DEV-FE
plugins.description: React/TypeScript/Tanstack Query/Tanstack Router frontend development guidelines. Includes dev-docs-fe command for creating comprehensive technical requirement specifications.

plugins.name: DEV-ESSENTIALS
plugins.description: Development essentials with specialized agents, git workflow skill, code review and verification commands, backend TRS documentation, and 8 development quality hooks

plugins.name: essentials
plugins.description: Expert consultation skills, skill development tools, and web research agent for enhanced development workflow

plugins.name: learning-coach
plugins.description: Personal learning and system design coach with comprehensive coverage of general learning, SWE system design (LLD & HLD with 35 problems), and ML system design (9-step framework with 10 MLE interview problems including visual search, recommendations, and content moderation).

plugins.name: financial-coach
plugins.description: Personal financial coach with company valuation analysis and YouTube video analysis skills. Includes multi-phase investment framework with moat assessment, sector-specific valuation metrics, reverse DCF reality checks, and comprehensive video transcript analysis.

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous ML research plugin covering Karpathy's experiment loops, SkyPilot parallel GPU scaling, and the AI Scientist's multi-phase research pipeline with tree search, manuscript generation, and automated peer review.
